description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex with a sprawling, angular footprint and multiple interconnected wings. The structure features flat roofs, extensive use of white and gray exterior surfaces, and large blue-tinted window panels, especially prominent along the longer facades. Several outdoor terraces and patios are visible, as well as landscaped areas and a distinctive circular driveway at the main entrance. The building is surrounded by a green lawn, with paved walkways and driveways leading to secondary structures, possibly garages or service buildings. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, multi-wing bungalow with flat roofs, white and gray facades, blue-tinted windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: The main entrance and circular driveway are visible, with the primary building wings and terraces facing forward.
description_view_1: Shows the rear and side of the bungalow, highlighting secondary structures and the extensive blue-tinted window panels.
description_view_2: Displays the long side of the bungalow with prominent blue-tinted windows and a large patio area.
description_view_3: Reveals the opposite side with additional terraces and a clear view of the building's angular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and extensive glass facades
